title: F1 Racecraft Podcast | Weekly F1 News & Analysis
description:
Welcome to Racecraft Explained Podcast, where Formula 1 comes to life through in-depth discussions, race analysis, breaking news, and behind-the-scenes stories.

Every episode covers the latest Grand Prix action, driver performances, team strategies, FIA decisions, technical insights, and everything happening in the world of Formula 1.

Whether you’re a lifelong fan or just getting into F1, you’ll find clear, engaging, and honest analysis every week.

What you’ll find on this channel:

title: Why Ferrari's SF-26 still has huge untapped potential | F1 Silverstone GP analysis
description:
🏁 Ferrari's Silverstone breakthrough explained! | Charles Leclerc dominates race pace | British GP 2026 analysis

Ferrari didn't just win the 2026 British Grand Prix—they produced their most complete performance of the season.

In this video, we break down the race pace data from Silverstone to explain why Charles Leclerc was the fastest driver over an entire race distance, how Ferrari managed to outperform Mercedes despite using fewer tyres, and why the latest upgrades are transforming the SF2

title: Ferrari vs Mercedes: the software battle explained 👀 #Ferrari #Mercedes #SF26 #F1 #BelgianGP #W17
description:
Formula 1 in 2026 is no longer just about horsepower. The battle between Ferrari and Mercedes is increasingly being decided by something much less visible: power unit software.

In this video, we explain why software optimization has become one of the biggest performance differentiators on the grid, how Mercedes gained an early advantage with its energy management strategy, and why Ferrari is preparing crucial software changes ahead of the Belgian Grand Prix at Spa-Francorchamps.

We also break

title: ANTONELLI IS CLASS! 2026 F1 Silverstone Sprint Race and Qualifying Analysis - British GP
description:
2026 F1 Silverstone Sprint Race and Qualifying Analysis - British GP
Kimi Antonelli delivers again! 💥

Mercedes' young star takes a sensational pole position at Silverstone, but the bigger championship story could be happening right behind him.

Both Ferraris line up ahead of George Russell, leaving the Mercedes driver facing the possibility of a significant points swing if he can't fight back on race day. I'll explain why Ferrari's qualifying pace was so strong, where Russell lost the crucial

title: 2026 F1 Austrian GP RACE Analysis
description:
2026 F1 Austrian GP RACE Analysis.

George Russell converts pole into victory at the Austrian Grand Prix, but the biggest stories came from the strategic decisions behind him.

Ferrari looked set for a podium with Charles Leclerc running P2, only for questionable tactical calls to unravel his afternoon and leave him finishing all the way down in P8. We break down where Ferrari got it wrong and how the race slipped away.

We also analyse Red Bull's final-stint strategy, where Max Verstappen was f

title: Ferrari's new flow deflectors explained 🚨 #Ferrari #SF26 #AustrianGP #F1 #Hamilton #Leclerc #Race
description:
Ferrari has introduced a subtle but potentially important aerodynamic upgrade for the Austrian Grand Prix! 🇦🇹🏎️

Rather than bringing a major redesign, the Scuderia has focused on improving the SF-26's aerodynamic efficiency with revised front-end flow deflectors and updated turning vanes. These small refinements are designed to optimize airflow around the front wheels, helping the floor, diffuser and sidepods work more effectively.

In this video, we explain why these changes matter, how Fer

title: 2026 F1 Austrian GP QUALIFYING Analysis
description:
2026 F1 Austrian GP QUALIFYING Analysis.

George Russell delivers a sensational pole position in Austria, putting Mercedes at the front of the grid ahead of both Ferraris. But with Charles Leclerc lining up near the front, strategy could be the deciding factor on Sunday. Ferrari have the pace, but they'll need to execute the race tactically if they're to challenge for victory.

Meanwhile, Max Verstappen's qualifying came to a dramatic end after a crash at Turn 9. We break down exactly what happe

title: Everything that made Lewis Hamilton’s first Ferrari F1 win possible
description:

title: 2026 F1 BARCELONA-CATALUNYA GP race analysis by Peter Windsor
description: This day in Spain will famously be remembered for the first Ferrari victory scored by Sir Lewis Hamilton.  And it was no gift.  After starting from the front row and splitting the two factory Mercedes in the early race phase, Lewis dramatically chose to make a second tyre change - to medium Pirellis -  at the perfect moment. His mid-race pace on the softer tyres quickly elevated him to the front when the Mercs stopped for their second set of hards - and Lewis always seemed likely to be there at

title: A TACTICAL MASTERCLASS! 2026 F1 Barcelona Catalunya GP RACE Analysis
description:
A TACTICAL MASTERCLASS! 2026 F1 Barcelona Catalunya GP RACE Analysis.

Hamilton delivers a strategic masterclass in Barcelona, using an aggressive 3-stop race to overcome Mercedes' 2-stop approach and take victory. While Mercedes focused on track position, Hamilton consistently exploited the grip advantage of fresher tyres, turning the race into a tyre-life battle rather than a pure pace contest.

Further back, one of the most interesting technical moments came from Kimi Antonelli's pass on Geor
